Sahara (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,671,925Details
International Box Office $52,973,465
Worldwide Box Office $121,645,390
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,068,372 (26.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.80 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$145,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,154 opening theaters/3,200 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $128,130,458

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 8th, 2005 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: April 8th, 2005 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 30th, 2005 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action violence
Running Time: 124 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Geographical setting: Africa
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Treasure Hunters
Social setting: Civil War, The Civil War
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Time period setting: 1860s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Bristol Bay Productions, Baldwin Entertainment Group, J.K. Livin Productions, Kanzaman Prods
Production Countries: Spain, Germany, United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English, French, Arabic
